# skills-travel-planner

> Open-source AI roadbook generator — https://github.com/huanyuzhilv/skills-travel-planner

- Website: https://huanyuzhilv.github.io/skills-travel-planner/
- GitHub: https://github.com/huanyuzhilv/skills-travel-planner
- One-liner: txt/docx itinerary → tripData.json → client-ready HTML/PDF roadbook for AI agents
- License: MIT

Search: AI路书生成, roadbook generator, Cursor skill, Claude skill, travel itinerary generator
